title: Lemon chicken
excerpt: Ingredients 1 whole chicken 2 onions, roughly chopped 2 carrots, roughly chopped 2 celery sticks, roughly chopped 2 potatoes, unpeeled, cut into quarters 3 lemons 3 sprigs of thyme 10 cloves of garlic 100 ml chicken stock soft butter to rub over the chicken salt and pepper Method Wash the chicken and pat …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 whole chicken
  • 2 onions, roughly chopped
  • 2 carrots, roughly chopped
  • 2 celery sticks, roughly chopped
  • 2 potatoes, unpeeled, cut into quarters
  • 3 lemons
  • 3 sprigs of thyme
  • 10 cloves of garlic
  • 100 ml chicken stock
  • soft butter to rub over the chicken
  • salt and pepper

Method

Wash the chicken and pat dry with kitchen paper.

Place the onions, carrots, celery, thyme, 7 cloves of garlic, 2 lemons cut into slices, the juice of one lemon (keep the halves to stuff into the chicken) and the chicken stock in an ovenproof dish.

Salt and pepper the chicken and rub it all over with butter.

Place the two lemon halves and 3 cloves of garlic in the chicken's cavity and set it on the bed of vegetables in the ovenproof dish.

Place the cut potatoes around the chicken. Cover with foil and bake for 60 minutes until done.

Remove the foil and bake until golden brown.

Easy!
